category_sources: Official documentation at https://ferron.sh/docs describes Ferron as a fast, modern, configurable web server with automatic TLS.
source_facts.description says it is a web server.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://ferron.sh/docs uses the product name Ferron.
docs_sources: Official docs at https://ferron.sh/docs provide getting started, common use cases, configuration reference, and troubleshooting.
source_facts.homepage is the official Ferron website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/ferronweb/ferron; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://ferron.sh/docs mention web serving and automatic TLS certificate management.
source_facts.description says it is a memory-safe web server written in Rust.
